scripts.build:test: npm run taxonomy && npm run enrich:full && npm run datasets:full && npm run audit:data && npm run audit:links && astro build
scripts.build:live: npm run taxonomy && npm run enrich:incremental && npm run datasets:incremental && astro build
scripts.insights:news: node scripts/insights/fetch-news-feeds.mjs && node scripts/insights/normalize-news-items.mjs && node scripts/insights/dedupe-news-items.mjs && node scripts/insights/score-news-items.mjs && node scripts/insights/enrich-news-items.mjs && node scripts/insights/generate-news-articles.mjs && node scripts/insights/build-insights-indexes.mjs
scripts.insights:v2: node scripts/insights/ai-rewrite-articles.mjs && node scripts/insights/entity-detection.mjs && node scripts/insights/tool-linking.mjs
scripts.insights:v3:signals: node scripts/insights/fetch-producthunt-signals.mjs && node scripts/insights/fetch-reddit-signals.mjs && node scripts/insights/fetch-hn-signals.mjs && node scripts/insights/import-google-trends-signals.mjs && node scripts/insights/merge-signal-sources.mjs && node scripts/insights/build-breakout-signals.mjs && node scripts/insights/generate-ideation-queue.mjs
